name: Apple Cinnamon Oats Recipe
instructions: Cook oats with milk, add diced apple and cinnamon. Microwave 2 min.

name: Avocado Toast Recipe
instructions: Toast bread, mash avocado with lemon, top with poached egg.

name: Chicken Stir Fry Recipe
instructions: Stir fry chicken and veggies, serve over quinoa.

name: Salmon Salad Recipe
instructions: Bake salmon, mix with spinach, quinoa, yogurt dressing.
